languages.text: Аборигены, деградировавшие мутанты и выродки, не рады прибытию колонистов. Они будут совершать нападения и саботажи на производствах при любой возможности.

traits.locale_text: Аборигены, деградировавшие мутанты и выродки, не рады прибытию колонистов. Они совершают регулярные налеты и саботажи на производствах.
Аборигены, деградировавшие мутанты и выродки, не рады прибытию колонистов. Они будут совершать нападения и саботажи на производствах при любой возможности.

languages.text: The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates, unwelcoming to the arrival of colonists. They raid the colony and sabotage the production lines at any opportunity.
languages.original_text: Аборигены, деградировавшие мутанты и выродки, не рады прибытию колонистов. Они будут совершать нападения и саботажи на производствах при любой возможности.

traits.locale_text: The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates who hate the colonists. They often raid the colony and sabotage the production lines.
The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates who hate the colonists. They often raid the colony and sabotage the production lines.
The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates, unwelcoming to the arrival of colonists. They raid the colony and sabotage the production lines at any opportunity.
The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates, unwelcoming to the arrival of colonists. They raid the colony and sabotage the production lines at any opportunity.
The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates, unwelcoming to the arrival of colonists. They raid the colony and sabotage the production lines at any opportunity.
The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates, unwelcoming to the arrival of colonists. They raid the colony and sabotage the production lines at any opportunity.

languages.text: Die örtliche Bevölkerung besteht aus Mutanten und Degenerierten, die die Ankunft von Kolonisten nicht willkommen heißen. Sie überfallen die Kolonie und sabotieren die Produktionsanlagen bei jeder Gelegenheit.
languages.original_text: The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates, unwelcoming to the arrival of colonists. They raid the colony and sabotage the production lines at any opportunity.

traits.locale_text: Die örtliche Bevölkerung besteht aus Mutanten und Degenerierten, die die Ankunft von Kolonisten nicht willkommen heißen. Sie überfallen die Kolonie und sabotieren die Produktionsanlagen bei jeder Gelegenheit.

languages.text: La population locale est composée de mutants et de dégénérés qui ne voient pas d'un bon œil l'arrivée de colons. Ils attaquent la colonie et sabotent les lignes de production dès qu'ils en ont l'occasion.
languages.original_text: The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates, unwelcoming to the arrival of colonists. They raid the colony and sabotage the production lines at any opportunity.

traits.locale_text: La population locale est composée de mutants et de dégénérés qui ne voient pas d'un bon œil l'arrivée de colons. Ils attaquent la colonie et sabotent les lignes de production dès qu'ils en ont l'occasion.

languages.text: La población local está formada por mutantes y degenerados, que no ven con buenos ojos la llegada de colonos. Asaltan la colonia y sabotean las líneas de producción en cuanto tienen ocasión.
languages.original_text: The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates, unwelcoming to the arrival of colonists. They raid the colony and sabotage the production lines at any opportunity.

traits.locale_text: La población local está formada por mutantes y degenerados, que no ven con buenos ojos la llegada de colonos. Asaltan la colonia y sabotean las líneas de producción en cuanto tienen ocasión.

languages.text: Yerel halk, kolonistlerin gelişini hoş karşılamayan mutantlar ve soysuzlardan oluşmaktadır. Her fırsatta koloniyi basıyor ve üretim hatlarını sabote ediyorlar.
languages.original_text: The local populace consists of mutants and degenerates, unwelcoming to the arrival of colonists. They raid the colony and sabotage the production lines at any opportunity.

traits.locale_text: Yerel halk, kolonistlerin gelişini hoş karşılamayan mutantlar ve soysuzlardan oluşmaktadır. Her fırsatta koloniyi basıyor ve üretim hatlarını sabote ediyorlar.
